name: Desktop PC – Terminal Spec Sheet Promo Flyer
svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" viewBox="0 0 1080 1350" width="1080" height="1350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="pc-bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1350" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_BOTTOM"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="pc-img-fade" x1="0" y1="800" x2="0" y2="1080" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP" stop-opacity="0"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP" stop-opacity="0.85"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="pc-img-fade-r" x1="420" y1="0" x2="580" y2="0" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP" stop-opacity="0"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP" stop-opacity="1"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="pc-glow" cx="240" cy="940" r="300" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stop-opacity="0.08"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <clipPath id="pc-img-clip">
      <rect x="0" y="580" width="540" height="500"/>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>

  <!-- LAYER 1: background -->
  <rect width="1080" height="1350" fill="url(#pc-bg)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 2: glow pool under image -->
  <ellipse cx="240" cy="940" rx="300" ry="200" fill="url(#pc-glow)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 3: price stamp block top-left -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="460" height="200" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
  <text x="30" y="58"  font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace" font-size="13" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP" fill-opacity="0.6" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_COMMENT</text>
  <text x="30" y="148" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="100" font-weight="800" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP" letter-spacing="-4">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_SHORT</text>
  <text x="30" y="188" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace"    font-size="14"  fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP" fill-opacity="0.55" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_SUB</text>

  <!-- diagonal cut on price block -->
  <polygon points="440,0 460,0 460,200 420,200" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP"/>

  <!-- LAYER 4: store block top-right -->
  <rect x="460" y="0" width="620" height="200" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_PANEL" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-opacity="0.15"/>
  <text x="500" y="58"  font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace"    font-size="13" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_COMMENT</text>
  <text x="500" y="128" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="52" font-weight="800" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT" letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_NAME</text>
  <text x="500" y="168" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace"    font-size="14" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT" fill-opacity="0.3" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_TAGLINE</text>

  <!-- LAYER 5: horizontal rule -->
  <line x1="0" y1="200" x2="1080" y2="200" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.2"/>

  <!-- LAYER 6: title band -->
  <rect x="0" y="200" width="1080" height="200" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_PANEL"/>
  <text x="30"  y="336" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="130" font-weight="800" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT"   letter-spacing="-4">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_MAIN</text>
  <text x="660" y="336" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="130" font-weight="800" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" letter-spacing="-4">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_ACCENT</text>
  <text x="30"  y="390" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace"     font-size="14"  fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT" fill-opacity="0.25" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_SUB</text>
  <line x1="0" y1="400" x2="1080" y2="400" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.2"/>

  <!-- LAYER 7: spec table header -->
  <rect x="540" y="400" width="540" height="44" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.08"/>
  <text x="556" y="428" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace" font-size="12" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.7" letter-spacing="3">COMPONENT</text>
  <text x="800" y="428" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace" font-size="12" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.7" letter-spacing="3">SPECIFICATION</text>

  <!-- LAYER 8: spec rows -->
  <line x1="540" y1="444" x2="1080" y2="444" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.1"/>
  <rect x="540" y="444" width="540" height="80" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.012"/>
  <text x="556" y="476" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace"    font-size="12" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC1_LABEL</text>
  <text x="556" y="500" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="26" font-weight="600" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC1_VALUE</text>
  <text x="900" y="488" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace"    font-size="11" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.35" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC1_TAG</text>

  <line x1="540" y1="524" x2="1080" y2="524" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.1"/>
  <text x="556" y="556" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace"    font-size="12" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC2_LABEL</text>
  <text x="556" y="580" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="26" font-weight="600" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC2_VALUE</text>
  <text x="900" y="568" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace"    font-size="11" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.35" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC2_TAG</text>

  <line x1="540" y1="604" x2="1080" y2="604" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.1"/>
  <text x="556" y="636" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace"    font-size="12" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC3_LABEL</text>
  <text x="556" y="660" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="26" font-weight="600" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC3_VALUE</text>
  <text x="900" y="648" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace"    font-size="11" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.35" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC3_TAG</text>

  <line x1="540" y1="684" x2="1080" y2="684" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.1"/>
  <text x="556" y="716" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace"    font-size="12" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC4_LABEL</text>
  <text x="556" y="740" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="26" font-weight="600" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC4_VALUE</text>
  <text x="900" y="728" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace"    font-size="11" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.35" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC4_TAG</text>

  <line x1="540" y1="764" x2="1080" y2="764" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.1"/>
  <text x="556" y="796" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace"    font-size="12" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC5_LABEL</text>
  <text x="556" y="820" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="26" font-weight="600" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC5_VALUE</text>
  <text x="900" y="808" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace"    font-size="11" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.35" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC5_TAG</text>

  <line x1="540" y1="844" x2="1080" y2="844" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.1"/>
  <text x="556" y="876" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace"    font-size="12" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC6_LABEL</text>
  <text x="556" y="900" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="26" font-weight="600" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC6_VALUE</text>
  <text x="900" y="888" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace"    font-size="11" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.35" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC6_TAG</text>

  <line x1="540" y1="924" x2="1080" y2="924" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.1"/>
  <text x="556" y="956" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace"    font-size="12" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC7_LABEL</text>
  <text x="556" y="980" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="26" font-weight="600" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC7_VALUE</text>
  <text x="900" y="968" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace"    font-size="11" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.35" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC7_TAG</text>
  <line x1="540" y1="1004" x2="1080" y2="1004" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.1"/>

  <!-- LAYER 9: vertical divider spec vs image -->
  <line x1="540" y1="400" x2="540" y2="1080" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.18"/>

  <!-- LAYER 10: product image bottom-left -->
  <rect x="0" y="580" width="540" height="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_PANEL"/>
  <g clip-path="url(#pc-img-clip)">
    <image href="PLACEHOLDER_PRODUCT_IMAGE" x="0" y="580" width="540" height="500" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>
  </g>
  <rect x="0"   y="580" width="540" height="500" fill="url(#pc-img-fade)"/>
  <rect x="420" y="580" width="120" height="500" fill="url(#pc-img-fade-r)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 11: bottom band -->
  <line x1="0" y1="1080" x2="1080" y2="1080" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.4"/>
  <rect x="0" y="1080" width="1080" height="270" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP"/>

  <!-- LAYER 12: what's included left -->
  <text x="30" y="1144" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace"    font-size="12" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.45" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_BUNDLE_COMMENT</text>
  <text x="30" y="1194" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="22" font-weight="600" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT">PLACEHOLDER_BUNDLE_LINE1</text>
  <text x="30" y="1228" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="22" font-weight="600" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT">PLACEHOLDER_BUNDLE_LINE2</text>
  <text x="30" y="1274" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace"    font-size="13" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT" fill-opacity="0.2" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_FOOTER_TEXT</text>

  <!-- LAYER 13: vertical divider bottom band -->
  <line x1="580" y1="1100" x2="580" y2="1330" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.15"/>

  <!-- LAYER 14: CTA right side bottom band -->
  <text x="616" y="1144" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace"    font-size="12" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.45" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_COMMENT</text>
  <rect x="616" y="1166" width="434" height="100" rx="0" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
  <text x="833" y="1228" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="48" font-weight="800" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP" letter-spacing="0">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_TEXT</text>
  <text x="616" y="1302" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace"    font-size="13" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT" fill-opacity="0.25" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_CONTACT</text>

  <!-- LAYER 15: terminal cursor decoration -->
  <rect x="30" y="1318" width="14" height="20" rx="1" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.5"/>

  <!-- LAYER 16: corner marks -->
  <path d="M0 56 L0 0 L56 0"         fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.4"/>
  <path d="M1080 56 L1080 0 L1024 0" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.4"/>
  <path d="M1024 400 L1080 400 L1080 444" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/>
</svg>

PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_SUB.label: Title subtitle
PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_SUB.default: ULTIMATE GAMING DESKTOP · RTX SERIES · LIQUID COOLED
